detaileddescription.para: Static method for conversion of an object of any class with the << output operator into a string

simplesect.para: The string representation of the object.

briefdescription.para: Compute set difference as this minus rhs.

parameterdescription.para: Other vector with symbols to be excluded.

briefdescription.para: Check whether key exists in the ordered vector.

detaileddescription.para: This function expects the vector to be sorted.

briefdescription.para: Get reference to the last element in the vector.

detaileddescription.para: Modifying the underlying value in the reference could break sortedness.

briefdescription.para: Implementation of a set using ordered vector.

detaileddescription.para: This class implements the interface of a set (the same interface as std::set) using ordered vector as the underlying data structure.

parameterdescription.para: Key type: type of the elements contained in the container. Each elements in a set is also its key.
